# Claude Code prompt — [5] Fix Tendering pipeline board layout (Withdrawn column)

*Paste everything below the line into Claude Code. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-26.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow
it. Small frontend bug fix in the Tendering module.

## The bug

The Tendering → **Pipeline** board (the Kanban view at "Project Ops /
Tendering / Pipeline") renders its status columns across a row: Draft,
Estimating, Submitted, Awarded, Contract, Lost. There is a 7th status,
**Withdrawn**, and it currently renders **below the Draft column** — an
orphaned block on a second row, left-aligned under Draft — instead of as a
proper peer column in the board.

## Fix

- Branch off `main`: `fix/tendering-board-withdrawn-layout`.
- Find the Tendering Pipeline board component under `apps/web/src/` (the page
  behind the Tendering "Pipeline" tab) and fix the column layout container so
  **all seven** status columns — Draft, Estimating, Submitted, Awarded,
  Contract, Lost, Withdrawn — lay out as consistent peer columns.
- The board has more columns than fit comfortably in one row. Pick the cleaner
  of: a single horizontal row of all 7 columns with horizontal scroll, or a
  layout where columns that wrap to a second row still align on the column
  grid as proper peers (not offset or orphaned). Match whatever pattern the
  app already uses for wide horizontal layouts; check
  `apps/web/src/styles` / the design tokens.
- Keep each column's existing card styling, the count + dollar-total badges,
  and the empty-state ("No tenders in this stage").
- Honour the responsive rule from `CLAUDE.md` (sidebar/layout behaviour below
  768px) — the board should still be usable on a narrow viewport.

## Gate

- Frontend-only change. Run `pnpm build`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test:web:logic`.
- Verify all 7 columns render as aligned peers with Withdrawn included, none
  orphaned below another.

## PR — do NOT auto-merge

- Title: `[5] Fix Tendering pipeline board layout (Withdrawn column)`
- Body: the bug, the fix, files modified; no new deps / env / migrations.
- Reviewer `GH-Mantova`.
- Create the PR and stop — do not enable auto-merge. CI cannot see layout;
  the owner eyeballs the board before merge.
